title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel hosts economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell to explore how AI economics might reshape capital and labor shares, wealth distribution, taxation, and inequality. The episode questions whether superior AI productivity necessarily translates to larger economic share for AI systems, and examines policy responses for countries inside and outside the AI supply chain.
